content.en:
Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

The Sumeru Realm God informed the other Peak Realm Gods about the Transcendent Treasure Land.

"Everyone, there are no resources in the Super Dimensional Treasure Land, almost all the high-level realm gods who entered this time have returned in vain, these high-level realm gods are very annoyed, I am afraid that they will not participate in the actions of our Taihao Tianzhu Palace in the future!"

Sumeru realm Shinto.

"What, the Transcendent Treasure Land has no resources, how is this possible!" A peak realm god wondered.

There are a lot of resources in a super dimensional treasure land, and the last time they had already sent so many high-level realm gods, they also had a lot of gains, why did they suddenly run out of resources this time?

"Sumeru Realm God, are you sure those high-level realm gods don't have hidden resources?" asked another peak realm god.

The Sumeru Realm God shook his head, "Bound by the oath, they don't dare to do this, even if there are high-level realm gods who dare to do this, it is impossible for them all to dare to do this!"

"That's weird!"

These pinnacle realm gods 05 are all puzzled.

At this time, the Sumeru Realm God said: "After the last time the high-level realm gods came out of it, there were still a lot of resources in the Super Dimensional Treasure Land, and the problem appeared in this 10 billion Supreme Dao Era, it was definitely the Bounded God who took the resources of the Super Dimensional Treasure Land. "

"If the peak realm god enters that superdimensional treasure land, he will definitely be targeted by superdimensional creatures, unless his strength can crush those superdimensional creatures. But the strength of some of the superdimensional creatures in that super-dimensional treasure land is that even our entire Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace can't solve it together!" said a peak realm god with a frown.

"But it is even more impossible for a high-level realm god to collect all the resources, and it is not easy for a high-level realm god to be targeted by an extra-dimensional creature, but once he encounters a super-dimensional creature, he will still be killed. If a high-level realm god dares to scrape resources on a large scale, he will definitely run into danger. "

"If it wasn't done by a high-level realm god, it must be done by a peak realm god. If we Taihao Tianchao Palace can't do it, it doesn't mean that other supreme forces can't do it, there are several supreme forces whose strength is much stronger than ours, and there is still hope to take away the resources of that super dimensional treasure land, but it also needs to pay a little price. "

"But that super dimensional treasure land is what we discovered, and other supreme forces also know about it, so they won't come to sneak into that super dimensional treasure land and plunder the resources there, and if it is really such a big move, it can't hide it from us!"

"I haven't heard of any supreme forces pouring out!"

"Then what do you say, it's not the work of other supreme forces, it's not the work of high-level realm gods, could it be that those resources disappeared out of thin air?"

"There is another possibility, that is, a superdimensional creature with incomparably high intelligence was born in that superdimensional treasure land, and that extradimensional creature integrated and collected the resources of the entire superdimensional treasure land and used it to cultivate its own subordinates. "

The god of the Sumeru realm guessed.

When the other peak realm gods heard this, they felt that it made a bit of sense, although the possibility was not very high.

But in cases where other possibilities are almost non-existent, this possibility is highly probable.

"If that's the case, then you won't be able to enter that superdimensional treasure land!"

The other pinnacle realm gods said.

"Even if this is not possible, we can't go in, after all, a treasure land without extradimensional resources, there is no point in going in again. There are still 20 billion to the Dao Era before the Jialanbao ship trade, and during this time, you have to find other ways to collect resources, and there is no need to put them on that super dimensional treasure land. "

"As it should be!"

In this way, these peak realm gods gave up on that super-dimensional treasure land, and there was no investigation.

If they knew that the resources of that superdimensional treasure land had been taken away by Ye Tian, they would definitely be extremely angry and immediately kill the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

......

this day.

Ye Tian was finally ready to break through the bottleneck and condense the ninth Eternal Realm Spirit.

This time to hit the bottleneck, Ye Tian chose to break through the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance Terran Temple at the Eternal Border.

To this end, he prepared some extra-dimensional resources that could assist in condensing the spirit of the Eternal Realm, and coupled with his own foundation, the success rate of this breakthrough reached more than seventy percent.

Terran Temple.

After Ye Tian was ready, he immediately swallowed all kinds of extradimensional resources.

Rumble!!!!

However, there won't be any major problems with the Eternal Dao species.

As for the problem of demon seeding, it is even more non-existent.

As more and more extra-dimensional energy increased, an extra-dimensional cocoon formed around Ye Tian.

I don't know how long it has been, this extra-dimensional cocoon has cracked, and Ye Tian's breath has burst out, even more powerful than before.

He had already condensed the ninth Eternal Realm Spirit, and he didn't feel weak at all. []

"It's worthy of being an extra-dimensional resource, not only does it allow me to break through, but it doesn't have the slightest sense of weakness, and I don't need to go through a period of weakness!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Next, Ye Tian replaced the other replica bodies with the replica bodies of high-level peak realm divine cultivators, and the strength of all the replica bodies skyrocketed.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current true combat power is already equivalent to the peak realm god who has condensed twelve Eternal Realm Spirits.

Of course, if it were those peak realm gods, who were also perfect-level Eternal Dao species of cultivation, Perfect 903 Eternal Realm Spirits, it would still be easy to beat.

He hadn't fought against the peak realm gods of the supreme forces, the Hellfire Realm gods were only the peak realm gods of the top forces, and the eternal Dao species he cultivated were only high-level Eternal Dao seeds.

Among those supreme forces, there are absolutely peak realm gods who have cultivated the perfect eternal Dao species, if not all of them, but they are also absolutely there.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't dare to be arrogant, and he didn't think that he was competing with the top peak realm gods.

After Ye Tianxiu made a breakthrough, he did not announce it, but continued to practice, and provided resources for his wife and children to practice.

Soon after, the cultivation of his wife and children also broke through, and the eighth eternal realm spirit was condensed one after another.

As a result, the strength of the Terrans skyrocketed.

But.

No matter how strong the strength of the human race is, it still belongs to the top force, and it is still very early to be the supreme force.

With the passage of time, while Ye Tian was cultivating, he was also communicating with those supreme forces, and some supreme forces still thought that Ye Tian had great potential, but they were also willing to know Ye Tian.

As a result, Ye Tian befriended several peak realm gods of supreme power.

In addition, Ye Tian also used super-dimensional resources to trade with these peak realm gods, and also obtained a lot of precious information and materials from them.
